What We Do

Electrical services you can rely on.

From small domestic jobs to full commercial installations — handled with precision, care and full certification.

Consumer Unit Upgrades

Old or unsafe fuse boards replaced with modern consumer units — fully certified and compliant.

Full & Partial Rewires

Complete rewiring for older properties or extensions, installed with minimal disruption to your home.

EV Charger Installation

Home EV charging points compatible with all major manufacturers, OZEV-approved where applicable.

Fault Finding & Repairs

Tripping circuits, partial power loss, flickering lights — diagnosed and fixed quickly and safely.

New Sockets & Lighting

Additional sockets, USB outlets, downlights, smart lighting and outdoor lighting solutions.

EICR & Certificates

Electrical Installation Condition Reports for landlords, homeowners and property sales. Fast turnaround.

Solar & Battery Storage

Solar panel electrical connection, battery storage and integration with your existing system.

Commercial Electrical

Office fit-outs, retail lighting, industrial wiring and periodic inspections at competitive rates.

How It Works

A simple four-step process.

Getting your electrical work done with Williams Electrical is straightforward from start to finish.

1

Get in Touch

Call, WhatsApp or use the form. We respond fast — usually within a few hours.

2

Free Quote

Alfie assesses the job and provides a clear, fixed quote with no hidden costs.

3

Book a Date

We arrange a date that suits you — flexible scheduling including evenings.

4

Job Done Right

Work completed to BS 7671, certified, signed off and tidy site left behind.

FAQs

Frequently asked questions.

Common questions from our customers — answered honestly.

Yes. All work is carried out by a fully qualified electrician and is compliant with BS 7671 (18th Edition Wiring Regulations). We are fully insured for domestic and commercial work and can provide certification for all notifiable work.

No — there's no call-out fee for quotes. You only pay for the work carried out. Emergency out-of-hours visits may carry a small surcharge, which we'll always confirm before attending.

A standard consumer unit upgrade typically takes 4–6 hours. We'll need to isolate power for part of the day. We plan around you and aim to have everything back on before we leave.

Yes — since 1 April 2021 it has been a legal requirement for all private landlords in England to have an EICR every 5 years. We can carry these out and provide the certificate promptly.

Yes. We install 7kW and 22kW home EV charging points compatible with all major manufacturers. We'll assess your supply capacity and advise on the best solution for your property.

We are based in Warwick CV34 and cover Warwick, Leamington Spa, Kenilworth, Coventry, Stratford-upon-Avon, Solihull, Rugby and surrounding areas across Warwickshire. Give us a call and we'll confirm.

Yes. Where possible we offer same-day and emergency call-outs for urgent faults. Call us directly on 07360 528992 — you'll speak to Alfie, not a call centre.
